use_actuals_btn: Isticmaal tirooyinka dhabta ah sida miisaaniyad
set_budget_hint: Guji unug kasta oo Miisaaniyad ah oo kor ku qoran si aad u dejiso yoolashaada, ama guji “Isticmaal tirooyinka dhabta ah sida miisaaniyad” si aad uga bilowdo tirooyinka muddadan.
click_month_hint: Guji bil si aad u faahfaahiso
ask_prompt: Miisaaniyaddayda vs dhabta muddadan: Dakhliga dhabta ah {revActual} vs miisaaniyad {revBudget} ({revVar}). Faa'iidada saafiga ah dhabta ah {netActual} vs miisaaniyad {netBudget} ({netVar}). Maxaa keenaya kala-duwanaanshaha oo maxaan diirad saarayaa?
